message:
fix(core,vdbe): gate wasm32-incompatible code behind cfg and suppress dead_code warnings

Add #[cfg(not(target_arch = "wasm32"))] to write coordinator service
types, methods, constants, and tests that rely on platform-specific
runtime features unavailable in wasm32 targets. Gate fs and tempfile
imports in vdbe tests similarly. Replace explicit drop() with let _ =
for write_coordinator_shutdown to silence unused-result lint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
